description: Style NoteActivate, strengthen and enhance your leg muscles with this pair of Shape-Ups Resistor Ambition shoe from skechers. With a great mesh, synthetic leather and suede combination upper in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your muscles, enhance maneuverability for a natural gait, and optimize support, flexibility and cushioning. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Comes with a DVD.Product DetailsSynthetic and mesh upper in silver and blueHas a padded mesh inner and tongueUltra light, injection-molded kinetic footbed which has antibacterial propertiesHas Resamax kinetic wedge technology to create a fluid stride which mimics a natural running gait by absorbing energy, minimizing imoact, creating resistance and maximizing your workoutA curved rocker bottom that moves effortlessly from one stride to the next, rolling through each motionOptimum traction outsole made of high-abrasion, ultra-light rubber outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
